scripts.dev: concurrently -n "🏢API,🎮PLAYER,⚙️ADMIN" -c "green,cyan,yellow" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:player" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:player && npm run build:admin
scripts.start: concurrently -n "🏢API,🎮PLAYER,⚙️ADMIN" "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:player" "npm run start:admin"
scripts.lint: concurrently "cd backend && npm run lint" "cd apps/player && npm run lint" "cd apps/admin && npm run lint"
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:push: cd backend && npx prisma db push
